plan.reasoning: SMILES is [CH2][O], analyzed as a biradical species with unpaired electrons on C (index 0, SP3, radical_electrons 1) and O (index 1, SP3, radical_electrons 1). This suggests •CH2-O•, suitable for ReactiveSpecies adsorption. No mismatch with user description. History is None, so this is the initial plan. Goal is lowest energy adsorption. Given biradical nature, start with bidentate adsorption via both C and O at a bridge site. Surface has Ag and Ga; hetero bridge Ag-Ga may provide differentiated binding for C and O. Site_type restricted to ontop/bridge/hollow; use bridge for two-point binding. adsorbate_binding_indices [0,1] correspond to radical atoms. No previous plans, so proceed systematically. Action: continue.
